backups.name: compose-inventory
backups.condition: test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml || test -f docker-compose.yml
backups.command: mkdir -p backups && docker compose config > backups/compose-${RUN_ID}.yaml && docker compose ps --services > backups/compose-services-${RUN_ID}.txt

backups.name: docker-image-inventory
backups.command: mkdir -p backups && docker images --digests > backups/docker-images-${RUN_ID}.txt && test -s backups/docker-images-${RUN_ID}.txt

backups.name: lxc-snapshots
backups.condition: command -v lxc >/dev/null 2>&1 && lxc list --format csv -c n | grep -q .
backups.command: lxc list --format csv -c n | while read -r name; do [ -n "$name" ] && lxc snapshot "$name" "pre-agent-${RUN_ID}"; done

tasks.name: compose-upgrade-plan
tasks.condition: test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml || test -f docker-compose.yml
tasks.prompt: You are working in an isolated git worktree. Inspect the Docker Compose stack and propose the smallest safe upgrade plan. Edit only compose files, docs, tests, and the changelog or .worker-runs/changelog/compose-upgrade-plan.md fragment directly related to the stack. Do not touch secrets or run live destructive service mutations. Commit your changes and report the commit SHA, changed files, changelog path or fragment, verification commands, and risks.

tasks.name: container-docs-and-runbook
tasks.prompt: You are working in an isolated git worktree. Write or update a runbook for the self-hosted service upgrade path, including backup verification, rollback notes, post-upgrade health checks, and a changelog or .worker-runs/changelog/container-docs-and-runbook.md fragment. Do not edit runtime config files. Commit your changes and report the commit SHA, changed files, changelog path or fragment, verification commands, and risks.

rollback.name: manual-rollback
rollback.command: echo "Inspect backups under backups/ and restore affected Docker/LXC/VM services manually after review."
